description.overview: The majestic Great Pyrenees was bred to guard sheep in the mountains. They're gentle giants with a calm demeanor but strong guardian instincts.
description.history: The Great Pyrenees originated in France/Spain.
description.temperament: Known for being patient, calm, gentle.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, thick double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The majestic Great Pyrenees was bred to guard sheep in the mountains. They're gentle giants with a calm demeanor but strong guardian instincts.
